queries.question: What are the average age rating and average critical rating for all action movies?
queries.sql: SELECT AVG(ageRating), AVG(criticalRating) FROM "Rating" JOIN Movie ON Movie.id = Rating.movieId JOIN Genre ON Movie.genreId = Genre.id WHERE Genre.name = "Action";
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (AVG(?agerating_a) AS ?agg) (AVG(?criticalrating_a) AS ?agg2) WHERE {
  ?rating a :Rating .
  ?movie a :Movie .
  ?rating p:hasMovie ?movie .
  ?genre a :Genre .
  ?movie p:hasGenre ?genre .
  ?genre p:name ?name_f .
  ?rating p:ageRating ?agerating_a .
  ?rating p:criticalRating ?criticalrating_a .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Action")
}

queries.question: What is the average rating for all action movies?
queries.sql: SELECT AVG(ageRating) AS average_rating FROM "Rating" JOIN Movie ON Movie.id = Rating.movieId JOIN Genre ON Movie.genreId = Genre.id WHERE Genre.name = "Action";
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (AVG(?agerating_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?rating a :Rating .
  ?movie a :Movie .
  ?rating p:hasMovie ?movie .
  ?genre a :Genre .
  ?movie p:hasGenre ?genre .
  ?genre p:name ?name_f .
  ?rating p:ageRating ?agerating_a .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Action")
}

queries.question: What is the average rating for all action movies?
queries.sql: SELECT AVG(criticalRating) AS average_rating FROM "Rating" JOIN Movie ON Movie.id = Rating.movieId JOIN Genre ON Movie.genreId = Genre.id WHERE Genre.name = "Action";
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (AVG(?criticalrating_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?rating a :Rating .
  ?movie a :Movie .
  ?rating p:hasMovie ?movie .
  ?genre a :Genre .
  ?movie p:hasGenre ?genre .
  ?genre p:name ?name_f .
  ?rating p:criticalRating ?criticalrating_a .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Action")
}

queries.question: Rank the movies based on their critical rating, from highest to lowest.
queries.sql: SELECT movieId, criticalRating FROM "Rating" JOIN Movie ON Movie.id = Rating.movieId ORDER BY criticalRating DESC;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?movieid ?criticalrating WHERE {
  ?rating a :Rating .
  ?movie a :Movie .
  ?rating p:hasMovie ?movie .
  ?rating p:movieId ?movieid .
  ?rating p:criticalRating ?criticalrating .
  ?rating p:criticalRating ?criticalrating_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?criticalrating_o)

queries.question: Rank the movies based on their ratings from highest to lowest.
queries.sql: SELECT movieId, ageRating FROM "Rating" JOIN Movie ON Movie.id = Rating.movieId ORDER BY ageRating DESC;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?movieid ?agerating WHERE {
  ?rating a :Rating .
  ?movie a :Movie .
  ?rating p:hasMovie ?movie .
  ?rating p:movieId ?movieid .
  ?rating p:ageRating ?agerating .
  ?rating p:ageRating ?agerating_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?agerating_o)

queries.question: Rank the movies based on their ratings from highest to lowest.
queries.sql: SELECT movieId, ageRating, criticalRating FROM "Rating" JOIN Movie ON Movie.id = Rating.movieId ORDER BY ageRating, criticalRating DESC;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?movieid ?agerating ?criticalrating WHERE {
  ?rating a :Rating .
  ?movie a :Movie .
  ?rating p:hasMovie ?movie .
  ?rating p:movieId ?movieid .
  ?rating p:ageRating ?agerating .
  ?rating p:criticalRating ?criticalrating .
  ?rating p:ageRating ?agerating_o .
  ?rating p:criticalRating ?criticalrating_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?agerating_o) DESC(?criticalrating_o)
